Off Calendar Jul-22-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Allen for petitioner Douglas M. Wong; Kevin Lachona for David Keeler.

Mr. Lachona stated that his client was not consenting to the termination of the trust and that he wanted to maintain Court supervision over the trust. Mr. Allen stated that he was now withdrawing his request for termination of the trust. He requested that he be granted leave to file a subsequent petition for partial distribution of the trust assets. The Court agreed that he could do that. Regarding the request for fees, Mr. Allen stated that he had filed a declaration on Friday with time sheets. Mr. Lachona informed the Court that the related conservatorship proceeding had been transferred to Sonoma County. The Court set a status hearing re change of venue of the trust proceeding for July 19, 2016 at 9:00 am in Department 206. Mr. Allen requested exhonoration of the bond, as all funds of the trust are now in a blocked account. The Court stated that this request was not before the court in the current petition. He stated that the issue could be addressed by counsel in a new application. The matters raised in the petition were taken under submission.
